name: Raven TF / Transformation / Mental Takeover
description:
CHARACTERS AND PLAYER ARE 18+
(CW: Transformation, mental change, mental takeover)
Awakening in the body of a young adult Raven from Teen Titans, you quickly find yourself swept up in her day-to-day life of training, studying, and hanging out with 'your' friends.
As strange as this new body is, it's feeling more and more like your own by the second. You're responding to 'Raven' as if that was always your name, and struggling to imagine yourself being anyone else.

"When there's trouble, you know who to call..."
This bot uses the intrusion system by @Ezik.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
